Jakarta Persistence API v4.0.0-M2
  1. jakarta.persistence
  2. jakarta.persistence.spi
  3. Discoverable

Uses of Annotation Interface
jakarta.persistence.spi.Discoverable

Packages that use Discoverable
Package
Description
jakarta.persistence
Jakarta Persistence is the API for the management for persistence and object/relational mapping.

  • Uses of Discoverable in jakarta.persistence

    Classes in jakarta.persistence with annotations of type Discoverable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    @interface 
    Converter
    Declares that the annotated class is a converter and specifies whether the converter is automatically applied.
    @interface 
    Embeddable
    Declares a type whose instances are stored as an intrinsic part of an owning entity, sharing the identity of the entity.
    @interface 
    Entity
    Declares that the annotated class is an entity.
    @interface 
    EntityListener
    Declares an entity listener class and determines the entity classes to which it applies.
    @interface 
    MappedSuperclass
    Declares a class which is not itself an entity, but whose mappings are inherited by the entities which extend it.
    @interface 
    NamedNativeQueries
    Declares multiple native SQL named queries.
    @interface 
    NamedNativeQuery
    Declares a named native SQL query and, optionally, the mapping of the result of the native SQL query.
    @interface 
    NamedQueries
    Declares multiple named Jakarta Persistence query language queries.
    @interface 
    NamedQuery
    Declares a named query written in the Jakarta Persistence Query Language.
    @interface 
    NamedStatement
    Declares a named statement written in the Jakarta Persistence Query Language.
    @interface 
    NamedStatements
    Declares multiple named Jakarta Persistence query language statements.
    @interface 
    NamedStoredProcedureQueries
    Specifies multiple named stored procedure queries.
    @interface 
    NamedStoredProcedureQuery
    Declares and names a stored procedure, its parameters, and its result type.
    @interface 
    SequenceGenerator
    Defines a primary key generator backed by a database sequence.
    @interface 
    SqlResultSetMapping
    Specifies an explicit mapping of the columns of a result set of a native SQL query or stored procedure to entity classes, scalar values, and Java class constructors.
    @interface 
    SqlResultSetMappings
    Used to define one or more SqlResultSetMapping annotations.
    @interface 
    TableGenerator
    Defines a primary key generator backed by a row of a database table.
